properties.name: async.core-pool-size
properties.description: Core number of threads in the async thread pool.

properties.name: async.max-pool-size
properties.description: Maximum number of threads in the async thread pool.

properties.name: async.queue-capacity
properties.description: Queue capacity for the async thread pool.

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for JWT token signing.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds.
